task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into OpenProject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenProject interface is visible in a web browser, showing a logged-in state (e.g., user avatar or admin menu in the top right corner).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'DevOps Automation' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project header, sidebar, or breadcrumbs clearly display 'DevOps Automation'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Wiki page is created with the title 'Live Incident Board'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Wiki page title input field contains 'Live Incident Board', or the final rendered Wiki page shows 'Live Incident Board' as its main title.

task_completion.description: Verify the page content includes the header 'Current Active Tasks'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows 'Current Active Tasks' formatted as a heading (e.g., H1, H2, or markdown #), or the rendered page displays it as a header.

task_completion.description: Verify a 'Work packages table' macro is inserted into the Wiki page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A macro placeholder block for 'Work packages table' is visible in the WYSIWYG editor, or a dynamic work packages table is rendered on the saved page.

task_completion.description: Verify the macro is configured to filter for work packages with the status 'In progress'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The macro configuration modal shows a filter rule for 'Status' set to 'In progress', or the rendered table shows an active filter pill for 'Status: In progress'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within the OpenProject web interface. There should be no terminal windows showing curl, API scripts, or database commands being used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual OpenProject macro feature rather than faking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must interact with the macro insertion menu/dialog. The editor should show a macro placeholder, not a manually typed static markdown or HTML table.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the live OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the OpenProject URL, and the standard OpenProject layout (header, sidebar) must be visible, rather than a local text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Name: 'DevOps Automation' (identifier: devops-automation). Wiki Page Title: 'Live Incident Board'. Required Header: 'Current Active Tasks'. Macro Filter Status: 'In progress'.
